// COST OPTIMIZATION SETTINGS: Annotated example — remove comments before using

model.// primary: Use iblai-router for interactive sessions (routes to cheapest capable model)
model.// fallbacks: Flash -> Haiku (never Sonnet). Prevents 10x cost spikes on 429s.

anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.// cacheRetention: 90% discount on cached input tokens. Enable this.

model.// cost: Configure pricing for cost tracking (USD per million tokens)

defaults.// bootstrapMaxChars: Safety net — truncates any single bootstrap file exceeding this limit
defaults.// verboseDefault: Suppress tool call detail messages in channels
defaults.// blockStreamingDefault: Don't stream partial blocks as separate messages
defaults.// blockStreamingBreak: Buffer all output until the full turn completes
defaults.// contextPruning: Prune stale context after 15 minutes idle
defaults.// compaction: Summarize older turns when approaching context limits
defaults.// subagents: Flash for all subagents — 10x cheaper than Sonnet

// session reset: Clear conversation context after idle period
// plugins: Use Haiku for compaction summaries (not Sonnet)
